top_signals.title: Mamdani fires back at Bezos over Queens teacher tax remark
top_signals.summary: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos called for eliminating federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners as Mamdani pushes a luxury second-home tax in New York City.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ebola outbreak likely started months ago, spread undetected
top_signals.summary: The rare Bundibugyo strain circulated for "a couple months" before being identified in blood samples on May 15.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
